description: STM32F407 (Cortex-M4): huart1 accessed from both vTelemetryTask and vCommandTask without a shared FreeRTOS mutex — HAL __HAL_LOCK is not RTOS-safe (STM-005). HAL_NVIC_SetPriorityGrouping(NVIC_PRIORITYGROUP_2) called after HAL_Init() overrides the required Group 4 setting, breaking FreeRTOS BASEPRI masking (STM-006).
